message:
fix(formulas): use bin/"name" format in test blocks

Fix Rubocop style violation in cm, xf, ru, and ubs formulas:
- Change `"#{bin}/name"` to `bin/"name"` format in shell_output calls
- This satisfies Homebrew's style guide for executable path construction

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -51,6 +51,6 @@ def caveats
   end
 
   test do
-    assert_match version.to_s, shell_output("#{bin}/cm --version")
+    assert_match version.to_s, shell_output("#{bin/"cm"} --version")
   end
 end

@@ -165,7 +165,7 @@ def caveats
   end
 
   test do
-    assert_match version.to_s, shell_output("#{bin}/ru --version")
-    assert_match "sync", shell_output("#{bin}/ru --help")
+    assert_match version.to_s, shell_output("#{bin/"ru"} --version")
+    assert_match "sync", shell_output("#{bin/"ru"} --help")
   end
 end

@@ -33,7 +33,7 @@ def caveats
   end
 
   test do
-    assert_match version.to_s, shell_output("#{bin}/ubs --version")
-    assert_match "scan", shell_output("#{bin}/ubs --help")
+    assert_match version.to_s, shell_output("#{bin/"ubs"} --version")
+    assert_match "scan", shell_output("#{bin/"ubs"} --help")
   end
 end

@@ -50,7 +50,7 @@ def caveats
   end
 
   test do
-    assert_match version.to_s, shell_output("#{bin}/xf --version")
-    assert_match "search", shell_output("#{bin}/xf --help")
+    assert_match version.to_s, shell_output("#{bin/"xf"} --version")
+    assert_match "search", shell_output("#{bin/"xf"} --help")
   end
 end
